HGSS.335.0000:
A Pokémon Center near a cave?
That’s mighty convenient.
HGSS.335.0001:
The last time I came by the Power
Plant, I heard somebody screaming,\r
“Oh no, it must be a thief!”\f
I think it was the Manager’s voice.
HGSS.335.0002:
I hear Team Rocket got back together
in Johto but fell apart right away.\f
I didn’t know anything about that.
HGSS.335.0003:
You can’t see it from here, but there’s
a Power Plant south of this\r
Pokémon Center!
